_comment: FROZEN harness-grounding PreToolUse guard (A1). hooks-ensure-infra.md MERGES this single entry into the consumer's .claude/settings.json hooks.PreToolUse array — it never overwrites the file or other hooks. Matcher scoped to Edit|Write only. Non-blocking by design: the script (hooks/harness-grounding.sh) only ever emits additionalContext or exits silently — it must never emit a deny/ask permissionDecision. This fires on EVERY Edit/Write in the session, so the script's non-match path is pure bash string match after one jq parse, no file reads.
